title: Create Fabulously
description: A cool modpack with some extra mods to play with over 300 FPS
body:
![Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eae4f9a17f6d94aa5547cf610bf101e2edec11c.png)This modpack adds the cool Create mod and many other stuff, like lots of performance mods, (e.g. Sodium, Iris and Lithium) so you don't have to worry about your Framerate.


There are also some nice Equipment, Food, Utility and decoration mods like Better Tridents, Farmers delight (+ addons), Debug Keybind + Jade + REI and create deco + decorative blocks.

So this modpack lets you play much cool mods and have a very high Framerate at the same time! 

P.S.: With my mac m1 i get 378 FPS without Shader and 121 with
